title: picris babylonica
intro: Picris babylonica, also known as Babylon Picris, is a perennial herb belonging to the dandelion family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Picris babylonica include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Picris babylonica is often used as a tincture or infused in teas, and can also be applied topically to the skin as a poultice or ointment.
